ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  AION-TECH Solutions has made a further Rs. 60 lakh equity investment in its wholly-owned subsidiary, ROQIT GREENFLEET DIGITAL SOLUTIONS, bringing the cumulative investment to Rs. 10.40 crore. ROQIT, an early-stage company incorporated in December 2024, focuses on zero-emission fleet technology (EV/Hydrogen mobility) and is utilizing these funds for operational and product development. A material impact and potential red flag is ROQIT's minimal revenue generation of Rs. 18.7 lakhs in FY26, indicating it remains heavily capital-intensive with a substantial cumulative investment for an entity yet to achieve considerable commercial success.
